calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Stipulated Settlement.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Michael Rainfsnider Esq., for the Plaintiff William L. Thacher.
Rafael Crespo, Jr., Esq., appearing for Defendant Elias Saybe, dba Fits Fashion.
Plaintiff William L. Thacher present in court. Defendant Elias Saybe present in court.
Counsel for Plaintiff read into the record paragraph 5 of 4 page stipulation.
Court approved settlement and signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment. See Scanned document.
